hero.headline: Helping you move from stuck to shipped
hero.subheadline: Independent consulting for senior knowledge workers who need a thinking partner — not another task tracker.

about.title: About
about.intro: Ten years across product strategy, engineering leadership, and operating in ambiguous environments. Available for a limited number of engagements at any given time.

book.page_intro: Pick a time that works for you. All sessions are free for the first conversation. We'll meet on Google Meet — link arrives in your confirmation email.
book.consult_description: Quick orientation call — what you're working on, where you're stuck, whether I'm a fit.
book.coaching_description: Deeper working session for an issue you've already framed.

post_booking.confirmed_body: Confirmation and calendar invitation sent to your email. If you need to reschedule or cancel, use the link in that email — Cal.com handles it without my involvement.
post_booking.cancelled_body: No charge — these sessions are free. Feel free to book another time whenever it works.
